title: bridge duel prefected
description: a resource pack that designed to improve the experience while playing in hypixel bridge duel
body:
a resource pack that designed to improve the experience while playing in hypixel bridge duel.

it make tools smaller add block outline make the heart hunger and golden apple simmpler make the diamond to a emoji(because it used for emotes) and make the xp bar a arrow(becouse it shows how much time you need to wait until you can use the bow agin)![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aab017a14a8395de60e130413a761b8126d87d69.png)
